headline: Chuckles McSnortberry Wins Laughing Contest By Not Laughing At All, Calls It 'Reverse Psychology'
summary: The judges were so confused by his seriousness that they awarded him first place.
fullBody: Chuckles McSnortberry won a laughing contest by refusing to laugh. 'Everyone else was trying too hard,' McSnortberry explained, stone-faced. The judges, confused by his 'aggressive neutrality,' awarded him first place. 'We thought it was a bit,' one judge admitted. McSnortberry plans to defend his title next year by 'not showing up' and calling it 'conceptual comedy.'
